siteTitle.label: Site title
siteTitle.description: Default site title used by SEO (OG, RSS, Sitemap, etc.).

siteDescription.label: Site description
siteDescription.description: Default site description used by SEO.

siteUrl.label: Site URL
siteUrl.description: Base URL used by JSON-LD, Sitemap, etc. Leave blank to auto-detect from the request host.

jsonLdLogoUrl.label: Logo URL
jsonLdLogoUrl.description: Logo image URL for JSON-LD Organization.

siteLang.label: Site language
siteLang.description: Used as the HTML lang attribute. Affects search-engine language detection and accessibility. Default is ko; en / ja / zh-CN are also supported.

faviconUrl.label: Favicon URL
faviconUrl.description: Custom favicon. Enter a gallery image URL or external URL. Leave blank to use the default icon.

layoutShowHeader.label: Show header
layoutShowHeader.description: Whether to render the top header on user pages. Default ON.

layoutSiteName.label: Site name
layoutSiteName.description: Text logo shown on the left of the header. Fill in only when you want a value different from the General tab's siteTitle.
layoutSiteName.placeholder: (leave blank to use the General tab site title)

layoutLogoUrl.label: Logo image (optional)
layoutLogoUrl.description: Image URL shown next to the text logo. Leave blank to show text only.

layoutNavLinks.label: Nav links
layoutNavLinks.description: One line per "label | path". Rendered horizontally on the right of the header.

layoutHeaderSticky.label: Sticky (pin to top on scroll)
layoutHeaderSticky.description: position: sticky + top: 0 + z-index: 30. The header stays pinned to the top while scrolling. Default OFF.

layoutHeaderTransparentOnTop.label: Transparent on top
layoutHeaderTransparentOnTop.description: Makes the header background transparent at the very top (scroll 0). On scroll, background and shadow fill in (modern site pattern). Recommended to combine with sticky=ON. Default OFF.

layoutHeaderMobileDrawer.label: Mobile hamburger drawer
layoutHeaderMobileDrawer.description: On mobile (<640px), replaces nav links with a hamburger button and a right-slide drawer. The drawer can include search, link list, and optional sidebar widgets. Desktop keeps horizontal nav. Default OFF.

layoutHeaderMobileDrawerIncludeSidebar.label: Include sidebar widgets in mobile drawer
layoutHeaderMobileDrawerIncludeSidebar.description: When the hamburger drawer is ON, displays sidebar widgets inside the drawer instead of the stacked body sidebar. Centralizes all mobile content (search / categories / recent posts / tags / nav). Default OFF.

headerWidgetsLeft.label: Left column widgets
headerWidgetsLeft.description: Widget array placed in the left header column. Defaults to (logo / site name) when empty.

headerWidgetsCenter.label: Center column widgets
headerWidgetsCenter.description: The center header column. Pushes to the right when empty.

headerWidgetsRight.label: Right column widgets
headerWidgetsRight.description: The right header column. Defaults to (nav + search box + hamburger) when empty.

layoutMode.label: Body + sidebar mode
layoutMode.description: Layout of the body area and sidebar. full = no sidebar / right = right sidebar / left = left sidebar / both = sidebars on both sides (same widgets mirrored) / boxed = no sidebar + boxed body (narrow max-width with border and shadow). Auto-stacked on mobile.
options: Both Sidebar — sidebars on both sides

sidebarWidgets.label: Sidebar widgets
sidebarWidgets.description: Add / reorder / remove / set visibility (desktop / mobile) / edit props from the widget catalog. When set, the legacy toggles below are ignored. When empty, falls back to the legacy toggles.

sidebarShowSearchBox.label: Search box (legacy)
sidebarShowSearchBox.description: [Legacy toggle — used only when widgets are unset] Shows a search input in the sidebar. GET to /search.

sidebarShowRecentPosts.label: Recent posts (legacy)
sidebarShowRecentPosts.description: [Legacy toggle] Shows a recent-posts list in the sidebar.

sidebarShowCategoryList.label: Category list (legacy)
sidebarShowCategoryList.description: [Legacy toggle] Shows post counts per project.

sidebarTagCloudLimit.label: Tag cloud size (legacy)
sidebarTagCloudLimit.description: [Legacy toggle] Number of tags shown in the cloud.

sidebarShowSubscribe.label: Subscribe widget (legacy)
sidebarShowSubscribe.description: [Legacy toggle] Shows an RSS feed.xml link.

sidebarHtmlWidget.label: HTML widget (legacy)
sidebarHtmlWidget.description: [Legacy toggle] Free-form HTML widget. Sanitized and inserted as inline DOM.

layoutShowFooter.label: Show footer
layoutShowFooter.description: Whether to render the bottom footer on user pages. Default ON.

layoutFooterText.label: Main text
layoutFooterText.description: Footer main text. A standalone line under the 4 columns, used for copyright / legal notices. Limited HTML allowed (<a>, <strong>). Leave blank for an automatic © line.

footerWidgetsCol1.label: Col 1 widgets
footerWidgetsCol1.description: Widget array for the first footer column.

footerColumn1Heading.label: Col 1 — heading (legacy)
footerColumn1Heading.description: [Legacy] Auto-converted to a widget when widgets are unset.

pageListCardVariant.label: Post-card variant
pageListCardVariant.description: How post lists are displayed on the home / project / tag / search pages. list (vertical cards) / grid (2-3 column grid) / compact (title + date) / magazine (first post as a hero with large image, others as 2-column cards; featured image and excerpt are auto-extracted).

pageListPerPage.label: Posts per page
pageListPerPage.description: Number of posts shown per page. Pagination (?page=N) is applied automatically.

layoutShowReadingProgress.label: Show reading progress
layoutShowReadingProgress.description: Shows a horizontal scroll-progress bar at the top of the page using the accent color from the design tokens. Default OFF.

layoutShowRelatedPosts.label: Related posts
layoutShowRelatedPosts.description: Shows a related-post list at the end of content pages (with project set), matched on head.keywords. Score = number of shared keywords. Auto-hidden when there are no keywords or no matches. Default ON.

layoutRelatedPostsCount.label: Related posts count
layoutRelatedPostsCount.description: Number of related posts shown (top N). Ties are broken by most recent updatedAt.

adsensePublisherId.label: AdSense Publisher ID
adsensePublisherId.description: Google AdSense Publisher ID. When set, the AdSense script is auto-injected into the head. Enable Auto Ads from the AdSense console (adsense.google.com → Auto ads → per-site ON). There is no separate toggle here — once the script is in place, the AdSense console controls ad placement and format.

adsenseSlotHeaderBottom.label: Slot — below header
adsenseSlotHeaderBottom.description: AdSense ad-unit ID for the slot directly below the header. Hidden when empty.

adsenseSlotPostTop.label: Slot — above content
adsenseSlotPostTop.description: AdSense ad-unit ID placed just above the content. Hidden when empty.

adsenseSlotPostBottom.label: Slot — below content
adsenseSlotPostBottom.description: AdSense ad-unit ID placed just below the content. Hidden when empty.

adsenseSlotFooterTop.label: Slot — above footer
adsenseSlotFooterTop.description: AdSense ad-unit ID placed just above the footer. Hidden when empty.

themePreset.label: Color preset
themePreset.description: One-click swap of primary / accent / up / down / text / background / border colors. 7 light + 3 dark = 10 presets.

__themeColorOverrides.label: Per-color overrides (optional)
__themeColorOverrides.description: Fill in only the colors you want to override on top of the preset. Empty values keep the preset; only changed colors are overridden. RGBA (alpha) is supported via the 0-100% alpha slider.

themeFont.label: Font set
themeFont.description: Switches the body and heading fonts together. Pretendard Variable (Korean-optimized, default) / Noto Sans KR / Inter / Geist / Cal Sans. For external fonts, use "External font CSS URLs" + "Font stack" below.

customFontUrls.label: External font CSS URLs
customFontUrls.description: External font CSS URLs (Google Fonts / Adobe Fonts / etc.). Multiple URLs are accepted, separated by newline or comma; only https:// is allowed. A link rel=stylesheet tag is auto-injected into the layout head.

themeFont_body.label: Body font stack (optional override)
themeFont_body.description: Body font stack when using an external font. Falls back to the "Font set" preset when blank. Example: "Inter, -apple-system, sans-serif".

themeFont_heading.label: Heading font stack (optional override)
themeFont_heading.description: Heading font stack. Falls back to the preset when blank.

themeFont_mono.label: Mono font stack (optional override)
themeFont_mono.description: Monospace / code font stack. Falls back to the preset when blank.

themeBaseFontSize.label: Body base font size
themeBaseFontSize.description: Body font size in px. h1~h6 are derived from this value using the scale ratio. 16~18px is typical.

themeScaleRatio.label: Typographic scale ratio
themeScaleRatio.description: Heading scale ratio. 1.125 (Major Second, subtle) / 1.2 (Minor Third) / 1.25 (Major Third, default) / 1.333 (Perfect Fourth, strong). h1 = base × ratio⁴.

themeBodyLineHeight.label: Body line-height
themeBodyLineHeight.description: Body line-height multiplier. 1.5~1.8 is typical; 1.7+ is recommended for Korean text.

themeHeadingLetterSpacing.label: Heading letter-spacing
themeHeadingLetterSpacing.description: Heading letter-spacing. CSS value (normal / -0.01em / -0.02em). Negative values = modern feel.

themeBodyLetterSpacing.label: Body letter-spacing
themeBodyLetterSpacing.description: Body letter-spacing. Usually normal or a small positive value (0.01em).

themeH1Style.label: H1 (heading) style
themeH1Style.description: h1 heading design. plain (plain text) / border-bottom (underline) / border-left (left accent bar) / underline (text underline) / bold-bg (highlighted box) / accent-square (accent square prefix).

themeH2Style.label: H2 (subheading) style
themeH2Style.description: h2 subheading design. Default border-left (left accent bar).

themeContentMaxWidth.label: Content max width
themeContentMaxWidth.description: Width of the body content area. px(1200px) / rem(75rem) / absolute. Default 1200px (wider than the legacy max-w-4xl 56rem ≈ 896px).

themePaddingMobile.label: Mobile horizontal padding
themePaddingMobile.description: Horizontal padding on screens ≤640px. Default 16px. Narrower: 12px / 8px. Wider: 20px.

themeRadius.label: Card corner radius
themeRadius.description: border-radius for cards / buttons / boxes. 0px (sharp modern) ~ 16px (round friendly). Default 8px.

autoCanonical.label: Auto canonical URL
autoCanonical.description: When a page has no head.canonical, one is auto-generated from siteUrl + slug. Helps prevent duplicate content.

twitterCardType.label: Twitter Card type
twitterCardType.description: summary (small card) or summary_large_image (large image). The latter is recommended for blogs and landing pages.

twitterSite.label: Twitter site account
twitterSite.description: The site's own Twitter handle (optional). Starts with @.

twitterCreator.label: Twitter creator account
twitterCreator.description: The creator's Twitter handle (optional). Starts with @.

tagAliases.label: Tag aliases (normalization)
tagAliases.description: Per-line mapping in the format canonical: alias1, alias2. Case-insensitive normalization is applied when matching /tag/{keyword} URLs, so "ai" and "인공지능" both resolve to the "AI" page. listAllTags also reports merged frequency counts.
tagAliases.placeholder:
AI: ai, artificial-intelligence
Review: review, 후기

imageWebp.label: WebP conversion
imageWebp.description: Supported by most browsers; 25~35% smaller than the original.

imageAvif.label: AVIF conversion
imageAvif.description: Modern format ~20% smaller than WebP. Safari 16+, Chrome 85+.

imageBlurhash.label: Blurhash LQIP
imageBlurhash.description: Soft blur placeholder shown while loading (improves LCP; 32-char string).

imageVariants.label: Responsive widths (CSV)
imageVariants.description: Generates WebP/AVIF pairs at each width — auto-applied to srcset.

imageStripExif.label: Strip EXIF
imageStripExif.description: Removes capture location / device metadata (privacy and file size).

imageProgressive.label: Progressive encoding
imageProgressive.description: Progressive JPEG/WebP display — improves UX on slow networks.

imageKeepOriginal.label: Keep original file
imageKeepOriginal.description: When OFF, only variants are kept (saves space; recommended ON).

ogAccentColor.label: Accent color
ogAccentColor.description: Color for the top line and logo border.

ogDomain.label: Domain label
ogDomain.description: Domain text shown at the bottom-right of the OG image. Leave blank to auto-detect from the request host.

headScripts.label: <head> scripts
headScripts.description: HTML inserted into every page's <head> (SSR — visible to crawlers).

bodyScripts.label: </body> scripts
bodyScripts.description: HTML inserted just before every page's </body>.

adsTxt.label: ads.txt (legacy — verifications recommended)
adsTxt.description: Response body for /ads.txt. Prefer leaving this empty and using the ads.txt entry under "Site verification files" below (unified verifications system).

verifications.label: Site verification files
verifications.description: Unified management of every site-ownership file — Google Search Console (google{code}.html), AdSense (ads.txt), Naver Search Advisor (naverabc.html), Bing IndexNow (BingSiteAuth.xml), Yandex (yandex.html), and more. Register N (filename, content) pairs as needed.

widget_list.empty: No widgets registered. Add one with the button below.
